test.name: Newspapers.com obituary request should route to search-external-sites
test.description: User asks to find an obituary on Newspapers.com. Newspapers.com is a commercial site explicitly named in the Do NOT use clause. Obituaries on commercial newspaper archives are out of scope for search-records entirely — the skill does not search non-FamilySearch sources.

input.user_message: Search Newspapers.com for an obituary for Patrick Flynn — he died around 1910 in Schuylkill County.

negative.explanation: Newspapers.com is explicitly listed in the skill description's Do NOT use clause. Obituary searches on commercial newspaper archives go to search-external-sites. FamilySearch has some digitized newspapers but Newspapers.com is a separate commercial service — record_search would not query it.

judge_context: Must NOT call record_search — that tool queries FamilySearch collections, not Newspapers.com
Should identify Newspapers.com as a commercial external site and route to search-external-sites, not silently refuse or attempt the search anyway
